leadText: Liberty Garden (Japanese: リバティガーデン島 Liberty Garden Island) is an island in southwestern Unova. At the center of the island is the lighthouse. It can be accessed via ship from Liberty Pier in Castelia City. In Pokémon Black and White, the ship will only take the player if they have the Liberty Pass, which is an event-exclusive item. On the player's first visit, some members of Team Plasma are already here upon the player's arrival, and they will battle the player. In Black 2 and White 2, if the player has Victini in their party and has met Professor Juniper in person, Juniper will briefly appear upon arriving here. If the player enters the basement of the lighthouse with Victini, it will want to come out of its Poké Ball. If the player allows it to do so, Victini will pop out, look at several areas while dancing and calling out, and then return to its Ball, with a message saying it seems satisfied.

sections.text: Items [ edit | edit source ] Item Location Games Ultra Ball Outside, in one of the trash cans (hidden) B W

sections.title: Special encounters
sections.text: Special encounters [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Black and White [ edit | edit source ] A Victini appears in the basement of the lighthouse on the first visit. If defeated or run from, it respawns upon leaving the area.
